title: Binlog Position Tracking and Offset Management

use_cases.name: Track Current Binlog Position
use_cases.description: Updates BinlogSourceInfo with current file, position, row, GTID, serverId, threadId during streaming

use_cases.name: Persist Offset to Kafka Connect
use_cases.description: Serializes restart-safe offset map including file, position, GTID set, events-to-skip, rows-to-skip
key_methods: offsetUsingPosition(rowsToSkip) -> {file, pos, gtids, event, row, ts_sec, server_id}

use_cases.name: Restore Offset on Restart
use_cases.description: Loads persisted offset back from Kafka Connect storage; uses BinlogOffsetContext.Loader to reconstruct state

use_cases.name: Manage Transaction Boundary for Exactly-Once Safety
use_cases.description: Resets/advances restart position at transaction boundaries to avoid duplicates or data loss
key_methods: BinlogOffsetContext.startNextTransaction() -> saves current file+pos as restart point

use_cases.name: Skip Events/Rows on Restart (At-Least-Once)
use_cases.description: On restart mid-transaction, re-reads events and skips already-processed events/rows using stored counters

use_cases.name: Override Binlog Position via Signal
use_cases.description: Operator sends 'set-binlog-position' signal to skip to a specific file/position or GTID set; persisted via heartbeat

use_cases.name: Serialize Position to Source Info Struct
use_cases.description: Builds Kafka Connect Struct with position metadata for change event envelope 'source' field
key_methods: BinlogSourceInfoStructMaker.struct(sourceInfo) -> Struct with server_id, gtid, file, pos, row, thread, table, query

use_cases.name: Validate Binlog Configuration
use_cases.description: Ensures DB has ROW binlog_format and FULL binlog_row_image before streaming; warns about purged binlogs

use_cases.name: Track GTID-Based Position
use_cases.description: Manages GTID set for server-assigned transaction IDs as alternative to file/position offsets
key_methods: BinlogOffsetContext.startGtid(gtid, gtidSet) -> updates currentGtidSet and restartGtidSet

key_relationships: BinlogSourceTask extends BaseSourceTask<P, O extends OffsetContext>
SetBinlogPositionSignal delegates to BinlogOffsetContext (via MySqlOffsetContext cast)
important_notes: BinlogOffsetContext maintains two sets of state: 'current' (live position) and 'restart' (safe recovery point)
restartBinlogPosition is advanced AFTER transaction commit; within a transaction it stays at BEGIN position
restartEventsToSkip / restartRowsToSkip enable sub-event granularity for at-least-once replay on restart
GTID mode and file/position mode are mutually exclusive offset strategies
SetBinlogPositionSignal persists the new position via a heartbeat event dispatch before connector restart
BinlogSourceInfo is @NotThreadSafe — all mutations happen on the single streaming thread
BinlogTaskContext holds BinlogConnectorConfig and is used as the task-scoped state container
